name: Kemp's Ridley Sea Turtle
conservationEfforts: Turtle Excluder Devices (TEDs) mandatory in US shrimp fisheries. Bi-national Mexico-US protection of Rancho Nuevo nesting beach. Head-starting program releases juveniles.
description: The smallest and most endangered sea turtle. Nearly all nesting occurs on a single beach — Rancho Nuevo in Mexico, where a famous 1947 film captured an estimated 40,000 nesting in one day (an 'arribada').
